name: son-of-hamas
description: Mosab Hassan Yousef's 'Son of Hamas: A Gripping Account of Terror, Betrayal, Political Intrigue, and Unthinkable Choices' — the true story of the son of a Hamas founder who became an Israeli spy, worked undercover inside the terrorist organization for over a decade, converted to Christianity, and eventually defected to the United States.
useCase: Understanding the Israeli-Palestinian conflict from the inside, the workings of Hamas, the moral complexity of espionage, the psychology of radicalization, and one man's journey from terrorism to peace.
knownRisks: Contains graphic descriptions of violence and torture
Strong Christian perspective (author converted from Islam)
Some claims are disputed by both Palestinians and Israelis
The author is seen as a traitor by many Palestinians
